title: Crysbidian PVP pack
description: This is a pvp pack for Minecraft java edition
body:
# **Info about me:**

Iam Maroo_craft, iam a young creator for minecraft resourse packs, i live in Egypt
, i program python and made small projects
# **Why its called "Crysibidian":**
I called it that because i used to make the pack the crystal and obsidian paleate
# **What does the pack add:**
It adds alot of things like:
- Short swords
- Outlined ores
- Side shield
- Small totem
- Purple diamond armor and tools
- Purple hud
- Low fire
- Dark mode
# **What can the pack offer?**
## More visablity
beacuse of the side shelid, small totem and low fire it wont be filling the screen and will make you see players from places you couldnt see before
## Dark mode
Because of dark mode your eyes wont hurt you when you are in a dark room or have eye problems
# **Why you should download the pack?**
If you download the pack it will maybe make you have more productivty and it will support me as a person
